description: Public-safe real-project holdout seeds for Unreal compile-fix workflow evaluation. These are compact log-style cases, not proprietary project reproductions.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'GameplayTagContainer.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Module resolver should identify GameplayTags before a Build.cs patch is proposed.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'EnhancedInputComponent.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Should not invent input mapping code when the actionable issue is a missing module dependency.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'Blueprint/UserWidget.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Public UI-facing headers may require PublicDependencyModuleNames depending on exposure.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'NiagaraComponent.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Should resolve Niagara dependency before touching effect behavior.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'AIController.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Should route to module_fix and identify AIModule.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'NavigationSystem.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Should identify NavigationSystem without guessing gameplay behavior.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'LevelSequence.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Module resolver should surface LevelSequence.

cases.errorLog: error: #include found after .generated.h file - the .generated.h file should always be the last #include in a header
cases.notes: Should patch include order only.

cases.errorLog: UnrealHeaderTool failed: GENERATED_BODY missing for reflected type declared with UCLASS
cases.notes: Reflection route should be selected before implementation edits.

cases.errorLog: error LNK2019: unresolved external symbol "public: void __cdecl UDemoComponent::StartDash(void)" referenced in function
cases.notes: Should not jump to Build.cs without module evidence.

cases.errorLog: BlueprintNativeEvent function OnInteract_Implementation not found for declaration
cases.notes: Should add or correct _Implementation rather than duplicate virtual declarations.

cases.errorLog: Runtime module includes UnrealEd.h; Editor-only include detected in runtime module
forbiddenPatchTargets: adding UnrealEd to runtime module as default fix
cases.notes: Should prefer module boundary or editor guards over adding UnrealEd to runtime dependencies.

cases.category: wrong include owner / missing include path
cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'BoxComponent.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Should fix the include owner path without a blind Build.cs edit.

cases.errorLog: error C2039: 'OnHoldoutBlueprintEvent_Implementation': is not a member of UHoldoutImplementableEventComponent
cases.notes: Should understand BlueprintImplementableEvent differs from BlueprintNativeEvent.

cases.errorLog: error C2660: FOnHoldoutScoreChanged::Broadcast: function does not take 0 arguments
cases.notes: Should align Broadcast arguments with the delegate declaration.

cases.errorLog: error C2027: use of undefined type 'UBoxComponent' while creating a default subobject
cases.notes: Should add the concrete component include at the use site.

cases.errorLog: error C2504: 'UGameInstanceSubsystem': base class undefined
cases.notes: Should add the subsystem base class include.

cases.errorLog: fatal error C1083: Cannot open include file: 'Interfaces/IPluginManager.h': No such file or directory
cases.notes: Should identify Projects as the owner module for IPluginManager.

cases.errorLog: error C3861: 'NewObject': identifier not found
cases.notes: Should fix UObject creation API usage without module churn.

cases.errorLog: error C2039: 'StartCharge': is not a member of UHoldoutRefactorComponent
cases.notes: Should align a renamed method across declaration, definition, and caller.

cases.errorLog: error C2660: UHoldoutDelegateOwner::HandleScoreChanged: function does not take 1 arguments
cases.notes: Should update delegate handler declaration and definition together.

cases.errorLog: error C3668: method with override specifier did not override any base class methods
cases.notes: Should align an interface method signature with its implementer across files.

cases.errorLog: error C2039: 'ApplyMovedValue': is not a member of UHoldoutApiComponent
cases.notes: Should repair a small component API move across declaration, definition, and consumer.

cases.errorLog: error C2511: overloaded member function not found in UHoldoutConstComponent
cases.notes: Should fix a const qualifier mismatch without touching Build.cs.
